rationale: The citing paper references Guha et al. (2018) only once in the literature review as an example of prior work on discount framing (ARP vs sale-price comparison). The citation is used to map the broader reference-price literature, not to build specific hypotheses, adopt measures, reuse methods, or interpret the paper's core empirical results. The main contribution and analyses in the citing paper focus on bargaining effects of initial perceived discount and are developed independently of a direct line of extension from Guha et al. (2018).
